contentPattern.structure: static stand-in for an out-of-scope interactive tool: readout value + status badge, an action-button label, and control rows (label + value/options); no application logic

suitableFor: free-tool pages whose interactive widget is out of scope (password generator, decryptor lookups, calculators, choosers)
signalling where a live tool/embed/fragment will be inserted
preserving verbatim widget labels so a section's layout reads correctly
notSuitableFor: functional interactive components (build a real block/embed/fragment instead)
promo cards with body copy + CTA (use card)

outOfScopeFlag: Represents application logic that is intentionally NOT migrated. Static presentation only; an author replaces it with the live tool later.
